ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., 'planned', 'in_progress', 'completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rabbits" (
  "rabbit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rabbit */,
  "rabbit_name" TEXT /* Name of the rabbit */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the rabbit */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the rabbit */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the rabbit */,
  "initial_weight" REAL /* Initial weight of the rabbit before the experiment */,
  "initial_temperature" REAL /* Initial body temperature of the rabbit before the experiment */,
  "initial_feeding_habit" TEXT /* Initial feeding habit of the rabbit before the experiment */,
  "initial_behavior" TEXT /* Initial behavior of the rabbit before the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rabbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "rabbit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rabbit being exposed */,
  "exposure_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol of the exposure (e.g., 'acute', 'chronic') */,
  "exposure_route" TEXT /* Route of the exposure (e.g., 'inhalation', 'injection') */,
  "exposure_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the exposure (e.g., 'Day I 30 mins') */,
  "exposure_date" TEXT /* Date of the exposure session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposure_sessions_rabbit_id FOREIGN KEY ("rabbit_id") REFERENCES rabbits ("rabbit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposure_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure session the observation belongs to */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer */,
  "carbon_deposit_color" TEXT /* Color of the carbon monoxide deposited on white fabric */,
  "body_temperature" REAL /* Average body temperature of the rabbits after exposure */,
  "weight" REAL /* Average weight of the rabbits after exposure */,
  "nasal_discharge" TEXT /* Nasal discharge observed */,
  "vomiting_rate" TEXT /* Vomiting rate observed */,
  "feeding_habit" TEXT /* Feeding habit of the rabbits after exposure */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks from the researchers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES exposure_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure condition */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure session the condition belongs to */,
  "carbon_monoxide_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of carbon monoxide in parts per million (ppm) */,
  "environment_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the environment during exposure */,
  "environment_humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the environment during exposure */,
  "airflow_rate" REAL /* Airflow rate during exposure */,
  "chamber_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the exposure chamber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposure_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES exposure_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rabbit_health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "rabbit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rabbit the record belongs to */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of the health record (e.g., 'pre_exposure', 'post_exposure') */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the rabbit */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature of the rabbit */,
  "feeding_habit" TEXT /* Feeding habit of the rabbit */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the rabbit */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the rabbit's health */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rabbit_health_records_rabbit_id FOREIGN KEY ("rabbit_id") REFERENCES rabbits ("rabbit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'researcher', 'data analyst', 'admin') */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., 'view', 'edit', 'delete') */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the system was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., 'csv', 'pdf') */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_category" TEXT /* Category of the equipment (e.g., 'exposure chamber', 'sensors') */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment usage event */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure session the equipment was used in */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was used */,
  "usage_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the equipment usage */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the equipment usage */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the equipment usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_usage_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES exposure_sessions ("session_id")
)
